description: Golden set for regression testing the dev-skill plugin. One spec per skill type.

functional_eval.prompt: Write a Go HTTP handler that fetches data from two upstream services and returns a combined response with proper error handling
expectations: Uses goroutines, errgroup, or channels for concurrent fetching
Handles errors from both upstream services without panicking
Propagates context for cancellation support
Uses buffered channels or other mechanism to prevent goroutine leaks

trigger_evals.query: I'm writing a Go service and want to make sure my goroutines aren't leaking when requests get cancelled
help me set up a Python Flask app with SQLAlchemy models

functional_eval.prompt: Review this TypeScript function for quality issues and suggest improvements: async function getData(ids: any[]) { let results = []; for (let id of ids) { let r = await fetch('/api/' + id); results.push(await r.json()); } return results; }
expectations: Identifies the sequential await as a performance issue
Suggests Promise.all or similar parallel approach
Flags the use of 'any' type
Suggests proper error handling for fetch calls

trigger_evals.query: can you review my TypeScript code for any bad patterns or things I should fix
write me a Rust web server from scratch using actix-web

functional_eval.prompt: Run the signup verification flow to confirm a new user can register, receive a confirmation email, and log in
expectations: Follows the skill's workflow steps in order
Uses the skill's verification script or assertions
Checks for successful state after each step, not just command exit codes

trigger_evals.query: I just deployed the new signup flow, can you verify it actually works end-to-end?
write unit tests for the UserService class

functional_eval.prompt: Generate and post my daily standup summary
expectations: Gathers git activity since last standup
Formats output following the skill's template
Includes both completed and in-progress work

trigger_evals.query: it's standup time, can you pull together what I worked on yesterday and what's on deck for today
help me write a retrospective document for the last sprint

functional_eval.prompt: Deploy the current branch to staging, run smoke tests, and report back
expectations: Follows the deployment workflow steps
Runs verification after deploy
Reports deployment status with evidence

trigger_evals.query: ok this PR looks good, let's ship it to staging and make sure nothing's broken
help me configure nginx as a reverse proxy

functional_eval.prompt: Find and clean up orphaned EBS volumes that aren't attached to any instance
expectations: Scans for orphaned resources before any deletion
Requires confirmation before destructive operations
Supports dry-run mode

trigger_evals.query: our AWS bill spiked and I think there are a bunch of unattached volumes we're paying for, can you find and clean them up
help me write a terraform module for an RDS instance

functional_eval.prompt: Create a new React component called UserProfile that displays a user's name, avatar, and bio
expectations: Uses the skill's template for component generation
Follows the naming conventions from the skill
Includes a test file alongside the component

trigger_evals.query: I need to create a new component for the settings page, it should follow our team's patterns
explain how React's useEffect cleanup function works

functional_eval.prompt: The checkout API is returning 500 errors intermittently. About 10% of requests are failing. Investigate.
expectations: Follows a structured investigation path, not ad-hoc guessing
Uses the skill's diagnostic queries or decision tree
Produces an investigation report with root cause and next steps

trigger_evals.query: we're seeing 500s on the checkout endpoint, it started about 30 minutes ago and it's getting worse
write API documentation for the checkout endpoint using OpenAPI spec

functional_eval.prompt: Why did our signup conversion drop 15% last week compared to the week before?
expectations: Uses the skill's query patterns to pull relevant data
Compares the two time periods systematically
Produces a structured analysis, not just raw numbers

trigger_evals.query: our conversion rate tanked last Tuesday and nobody knows why, can you dig into the data?
help me set up a new Grafana dashboard for monitoring CPU usage
